description: My experience with BlueFolder has been amazing. It's really easy to use, and I can quickly search for and track work requests. Entering data is simple, and I can easily send alerts and announcements to our team members across to Keep up the great work
author: Ramou B.
pros: What i like most is the demo and the free trial, which gives me more courage and confidence to used the sorftware
cons: It helps me in customer management and mobile access
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: I finally found the software I've been looking for!
description: Blue Folder is an excellent company that is dedicated to providing software that meets your specific needs. They are attentive and supportive throughout the process. The software is user-friendly and easy to navigate. It allows for easy addition of special fields, tracking of work orders, and generation of reports. I truly believe that the software setup couldn't be any easier. A big thank you to the team at Blue Folder! Matt and Paulina, thank you for your patience with navigating my request.
author: malinda M.
pros: The Blue Folder Team, consisting of Matt and Paulina, listened and worked hard to provide me with everything I needed to make my HVAC service calls software great. I had tried multiple companies, but each one was lacking in some area. Whenever I asked for help, they would say it was a special request and would increase our monthly cost. However, Blue Folder never hesitated to make it work and fulfilled my requests without any additional charges. They are truly awesome.
cons: The only thing lacking is the Map function.

description: Overall it serves us well, but the increasing costs might drive us to look at other options.
author: David V.
pros: Work order management works well both in the office and in the field. Automated recurring work orders help keep preventative maintenance organized. Work history is easily located, it's easy to add attachements etc. Customer support is excellent, always a quick response, always quick to address any issues we have.
cons: Sold in US dollars only makes it quite expensive for Canadian companies. Overall cost has become quite high. For our setup we have to do a lot of manual setup for preventative maintenance. Easier than on paper and automatically triggers work orders in the months we need though.

review_title: Great Program for Office and Field.
description: I enjoy every aspect of this system. I am able to allow access to the customers when we get the system built and they will be able to see their information and also to make service calls.
author: Danielle D.
pros: The set up of Blue folder took minutes. I sent the information to them and they loaded it up. Everything is easy to figure out and easy to find.
cons: When you delete something I have not been able to see if it is gone gone or if it is retrievable. There could be a person that accidently deletes information by clicking incorrectly and it may need to be brough back.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: 10/10. The implantation was easy, the support is great, training was also wonderful.
author: NeKesha M.
pros: The overall aesthetics. It’s easy on the easy and easy to work in
cons: The syncing to Quickbooks, and no real way to keep inventory
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Its not perfect but its pretty good, and I haven't found anything better
description: As the title says, it is not perfect, but its good. You don't have to change your whole business process like with say service titan.
author: John K.
pros: its flexible, you can get it to do a lot with the way you set it up. the support team, and really everyone we have worked with has been helpful. they are actively working on it and seem to care about there customers.
cons: it does not do a few things that seem obvious but they are working on them.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Your personal service and care for details had been OUTSTANDING! Everyone I have spoken with there from [sensitive content hidden] and [sensitive content hidden] they all have been there for me over and over and over! . I didn't have a say in picking out this product, but I am so glad our company did so. I can't begin to thank you all for your year of wonderful service and I am so looking forward to 2025. You all have given me the confidence with expanding what I can do, with providing my company with trouble shooting suggestions and support. I can do this because of your support. I could go one and on and on. But let me sum up Blue Folder software and your staff in two words Simply Beautiful, Simply Outstanding and The Best.
author: Franklin C.
pros: The Best. Uniquely Qualified. Wonderful Service. Over Extending. Remarkably Superior. Thank you. Thank you. Thank you.
cons: Seriously! You Are Kidding Me Right! For me there are no cons. That was a funny joke though. LOL

review_title: BlueFolder: Helpful but Lacking in Features
description: My experience has been ok with BlueFolder. It is good for start but no so perfect for advance work also align with features it offers the price is not justifiable. The mobile app also is not smooth so working during traveling is difficult.
author: Chuck E.
pros: I love how easy it is to customize it as per specific needs also the support is way more quicker than any other software in same category. It is very helpful and solve issues in no time.
cons: I least like the interface of it which looks so outdate with no modernity in it also the features are as basic as interface with no advance reporting.

review_title: Great for Task Management but Needs More Flexibility
description: BlueFolder has significantly improved our team's ability to manage and track tasks efficiently. The user-friendly design and responsive support make it a good choice for workflow management. However, more advanced customization and reporting features would make it an even stronger tool.
author: Riley J.
pros: Streamlines task management and scheduling effectively. Reliable customer support with quick response times. Easy-to-use interface that requires minimal training.
cons: Limited ability to customize features to fit specific business needs. Reporting tools can feel basic and lack depth. Pricing structure may not be ideal for smaller organizations.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall, BlueFolder is well-regarded for its effectiveness and customer-centric approach, although companies must weigh the cost and specific feature gaps against their needs.
author: Leticia A.
pros: Ease of use: The platform is intuitive and easy to set up, even for those without extensive technical experience. It is particularly praised for its work tracking and asset management features.
cons: Implementation time: Initial implementation can take time, and users recommend having someone knowledgeable about the technology to maximize its benefits.

author: Krunal P.
pros: BlueFolder holds a crucial role in tracking and managing all of our company assets. Not only equipment but vehicle tracking also. It provides reporting capabilities based on our needs to track and stay on top of inventory maintenance needs.
cons: BlueFolder takes some time to implement within an organization and for the software capabilities to be fully apparent for users. It is important to have someone technically sound to incorporate the software within the company for maximum benefit.

description: 5 years in, were good. A little pricey lately
author: Marie W.
pros: Keeps everyone on track for their daily duties
cons: None, it does all that we need to run our bidness

description: EXCEPTIONAL! service and support have always been spot on, helped when i had issues, helped on the new update. Responsive in a quick time period. Sale team has been helpful when I have had cusotmers that could benifit they helped me to setup a demo system. There are very few companies (especially software) that i like as much as this system.
author: Steve D.
pros: We have been with BlueFolder for many many years, and have watched it improve. We use it to run nearly every aspect of our business. Before I started this company, I ran a software development company in LA, this software is simple to use, powerful and would be the highest rated software systems that I use for my company. Without this system I would have to link together several solutions and doubt they would give me the tools and ease of use that this one system has. Steve Drake
cons: The calendar has issues with time zones. But this is common in most calendar systems. I live in Arizona and during half the year my appointments are set to the wrong time, even though my sales team puts them in correctly for the class. It adjusts to what it thinks is my local time, but the class is scheduled for a time in spite of the zone. This is an issue because I travel to those times, and it does not update when i am there.

description: Great. Again it needs a better way to reference materials used. Like when Im doing this review and I click on a question and depending on the answer another screen pops up. Asking for something else
author: Ben C.
pros: data base and a universal place for each customer information
cons: Better ability to have a data base of materials and how they can be searched for. If you can figure this out similar to the way turbo tax would ask info. Like this: When the tech add his time, Then a pop up screen" Did you use materials?" Then a scroll down screen.

description: I use BlueFolder daily to manage the Field Service Team for a medical device company. This software allows us the ability to track service orders from start-finish while collecting pertinent data.
author: Jordan H.
pros: This software is easy to use and navigate. Assigning tasks for team members is easy and notification keep you up to date on statuses as they progress through the service cycle.
cons: Reporting could be improved. It would be nice to have reports that can show how long a service order is in a particular status.

description: Great Choice!!
author: Judson C.
pros: Ease of use and customization!
cons: We need a proposal tool, and to be able to move line item up/down

author: Chris N.
pros: Bluefolder is easy to use and customize to our needs. We primarily use it to track our customers and service tickets.
cons: There is nothing that comes to mind at this time

description: Great!
author: Savannah M.
pros: I love the visibility that BlueFolder provides for our open Service Requests.
cons: I would like to drag and drop tickets to move the tech/dat its assigned to.

review_title: BLUEFOLDER WILL HELP YOU GROW YOUR BUSINESS
description: We have been using BlueFolder for five years to schedule and manage a very, busy elevator service department. Without BlueFolder we would not have been able to grow our company by 50%, It allows us to provide the type of information that the technicians need in the field to do their job and the home office to manage all of the customers and equipment. The System has a lot of ways to customize the information specific to your company's needs. Their customer support is extremely helpful and always accessible when needed. This was the single most effective decision we have every made and I highly recommend this system.
author: Paula C.
pros: The ease of data entry. The ability to manage technician's in the field and provide them with the information to do their job. The ability to integrate with QuickBooks for billing. This system has enabled our company's department to grow by 50%...
cons: Would love to be able to link multiple data sets for custom reports.

author: Dan K.
pros: Easy to configure and implement. The pricing was right. The BlueFolder team is easy to work with.
cons: Maintenance contracts are not directly tied to the equipment covered.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great experience! easy to use and work with.
author: Valeria B.
pros: Easy navigation between tabs and get access to all areas
cons: I do like everything so I cant say anything here...lol

description: It’s been very easy to handle
author: Keith H.
pros: Everything is easy to use. Service order creation is a snap
cons: At first the billing was not efficient for my type of billing.

description: It has make a difference in the way we run the service department as we can have more control.
author: Maricel M.
pros: Its easy to use and lets me stay organized in every way.
cons: The reports that you can do should be more friendly to do and more customizable.

description: Use it everyday, very easy and useful
author: Juan C.
pros: Easy to use. Cloud based. Available from anyware.
cons: Customer portal too simple, needs more reporting options.

author: Brad F.
pros: Blue Folder is fairly easy to use and I can train someone on it very quickly.
cons: It is kind of difficult to locate settings sometimes and I have to dig a little to find what I am looking for.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
